upstream_note: v2: full 6x6. Top-level cells are the openai-egress row for v1 compatibility; the full grid is under upstreams.<egress>.cells keyed by ingress dialect.
capability_note: advisory context only (probe-first: every cell is probed regardless): APISIX 3.17.0 ai-proxy has no native Gemini generateContent or Cohere provider, and no OpenAI-to-Anthropic/Bedrock converter (only anthropic->openai); other cells are grey by that capability limit (ai-proxy/base.lua, ai-protocols/converters/init.lua)

openai.verdict_note: HTTP 200, passthrough (same dialect, no translation required); round trip to the mock's openai endpoint confirmed

openai-responses.verdict_note: UNTRANSLATED passthrough byte-identical to the mock's canned openai-responses body; the gateway proxied /v1/responses through verbatim instead of translating (HTTP 200)
openai-responses.probe_note: probe failed: HTTP 200; response was the upstream's openai-responses body proxied verbatim, not a translation (passthrough byte-identical to the mock's canned openai-responses body)

anthropic.verdict_note: HTTP 200, anthropic envelope validated; mock received a openai-shaped request on its openai endpoint

hardware: AWS m7g.4xlarge (Graviton3, 16 cores / 64 GB). Gateway-under-test pinned to 4 cores (the comparable basis); mock and load generator on 6 cores each so the mock never bottlenecks the streaming sweep. Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
